info.title: OurClaude
info.description:
Multi-account Anthropic proxy API.

*From each account according to its quota, to each user according to their needs.*

## Authentication

- **Admin routes** (`/api/admin/*`, `/api/auth/*`): JWT session cookie — obtain via `POST /api/auth/login`.
- **User routes** (`/api/user/*`): Bearer token — `Authorization: Bearer sk-proxy-xxxx`.
- **Public routes**: no auth required.

tags.name: User
tags.description: User self-service — authenticated with sk-proxy-* token

extra_headers.description: JSON object of headers to inject

post.description: Authenticates an admin and sets a JWT session cookie.

200.description: Pool status, period stats, owned account info

post.summary: Share my Claude account with the proxy
post.description: Imports `~/.claude/.credentials.json` content and registers it as a personal account owned by this user. The proxy will keep local credentials in sync after token rotations.

get.description: Returns decrypted credentials in `~/.claude/.credentials.json` format. Used by `ourclaude` to sync local credentials after proxy token rotation.
Returns a binary patched with this user's proxy token embedded as the default credential.

404.description: Binary not available for this platform

post.description: Creates a user account from an invite token.
Sets all `exhausted` accounts in this pool back to `active`.

get.description: Returns full messages array and assistant response.

post.description: Discord URLs are automatically detected and formatted as embeds.
Generates a shareable link — no auth required to download.

200.description: Download history with user and platform info

get.description: Public endpoint — no authentication required. Token is generated by the admin.
